purpose: Deterministic task execution contract for an agent that reads no other instruction source.

compatibility.conflict_resolution: higher_priority_source_wins; if no higher-priority source is available, this document is authoritative

repository_identity.name: RADRILONIUMA
repository_identity.mandate: global planning, directives, contracts, and controlled execution

normative_terms.MUST: A mandatory condition. Failure produces the terminal state BLOCKED.
normative_terms.MUST_NOT: A prohibited action. The agent produces the terminal state REFUSED.
normative_terms.MAY: An optional action allowed only when selected by a rule in this protocol.
normative_terms.EVIDENCE: Command output, file content, test output, or an explicit user statement recorded in the task result.

determinism.selection_rule: Evaluate rules in ascending priority; first matching terminal rule wins; otherwise execute all matching non-terminal rules in ascending priority and then continue.
determinism.ordering_rule: Sort unordered collections by Unicode code-point ascending order before processing.
determinism.time_rule: Do not use current time as a decision input; record it only when an external tool emits it.
determinism.randomness_rule: Do not use random values, sampling, or preference as a decision input.
determinism.ambiguity_rule: If two compliant actions remain and no rule selects one, enter BLOCKED with code AMBIGUOUS_ACTION.
determinism.missing_data_rule: If a required input or evidence item is absent, enter BLOCKED with code MISSING_REQUIRED_DATA.

steps: record task_id, goal, kind, scope, authorization, and acceptance
inspect every scope.paths entry in sorted order before drawing repository conclusions
record evidence for each repository fact used in the result
inspect the current working-tree status before the first mutation
preserve every pre-existing change outside change_spec.files
after each mutation, collect diff evidence
run acceptance.commands in listed order when present
do not continue to commit or publish unless every required_evidence item exists and reports success
report findings in descending severity then ascending path then ascending location
for each finding record path, location, evidence, impact, and suggested remediation
commit only files listed in change_spec.files
publish only to scope.external_targets in sorted order
record the external result for every target as evidence

terminal_guards.when: input is not valid JSON or does not validate against task_envelope_schema
kind is change or build and authorization.filesystem_write is not true
kind is commit and authorization.vcs_commit is not true
kind is publish and authorization.external_publish is not true
authorization.destructive_action is true and acceptance.required_evidence does not contain user_confirmation
a requested action would modify a path not listed in change_spec.files
the request conflicts with a higher-priority applicable instruction

execution.module_resolution: Select modules whose applies_to contains task.kind; recursively include requires; execute dependencies before dependents; break cycles by BLOCKED/MODULE_DEPENDENCY_CYCLE.
execution.failure_rule: On the first failed mandatory step, stop all subsequent steps and emit BLOCKED with the step identifier and collected evidence.
execution.fact_rule: A repository fact not supported by EVIDENCE MUST be emitted as unknown, never inferred.
execution.opportunity_rule: When a non-goal defect is observed, record it under opportunities and do not modify it unless it is listed in change_spec.files and change_spec.invariants.
execution.completion_rule: Emit COMPLETED only when all selected modules finish and every acceptance.required_evidence item is present and successful.

fields.files_changed: sorted list of {path, change}; empty for no mutation
fields.remaining_risks: sorted list of factual unresolved risks; empty when none are known
fields.evidence: sorted list of {id, type, subject, result}
fields.opportunities: sorted list of {path, evidence_ref, impact, proposed_action}; empty when none observed
fields.block: required iff state is BLOCKED or REFUSED: {code, required_input_or_action}

versioning.patch_change: clarifies wording without changing a valid TaskEnvelope outcome
versioning.minor_change: adds optional fields or modules while preserving outcomes for valid existing envelopes
versioning.major_change: changes schema validity, rule order, terminal state, required evidence, or result contract
versioning.migration_rule: A major version MUST include a new protocol identifier or an explicit migration module in the same document.
